basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.age_details: Max 30 years for JRF, Max 35 years for SRF
age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum age limit is 30 years. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Maximum age limit is 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR-UGC NET, GATE) or National level examinations conducted by Central government Departments and their agencies. For SRF, 2 years of research experience is required.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course selected through any one of the following: a. Scholars who are selected through National Eligibility Tests- CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE b. The selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central government Departments and their agencies and institutes such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Qualification prescribed for JRF with two years of research experience.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000/- + HRA Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000/- + HRA

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow positions at AIIMS Delhi is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for JRF and SRF posts?
faq.answer: For JRF, a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course selected through national eligibility tests like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE is required. For SRF, the JRF qualifications plus two years of research experience are necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is 30 years, and for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post, it is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these research positions?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow (JRF) will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA. The Senior Research Fellow (SRF) will be offered Rs. 42,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this AIIMS Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow positions in this recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to submit their applications through the designated online portal or link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow positions at AIIMS Delhi will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is recommended to download and review it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These positions are project-based, indicating that the employment is contractual and tied to the duration of the specific research project funded by DST.
